name: Cookie Fruit Tart
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Have a cookie sheet and flat serving plate ready.
Crust: Combine butter, sugar, shortening, egg yolk, vanilla, and salt in a medium bowl or food processor. Mix well. Add flour and stir until well blended. Remove the processor blade.
Place a 12-inch square of foil on the work surface and sprinkle lightly with flour. Gather dough into a ball and place in the center of the foil. Roll out to a 9-9.5 inch circle. Place a 9-inch cake pan or plate on top of the dough and cut around it with a knife.
Fold up about half an inch of dough around the edge to form a rim. Crimp the rim with fingers. Slide foil onto the cookie sheet. Prick the bottom of the dough all over with a fork. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown, then cool for 10 minutes on the cookie sheet before sliding onto a cooling rack.
Allow the cookie to cool completely before serving.
Do not prepare the cream cheese filling more than 30 minutes before serving.
Stir sugar into the cream cheese just until well blended. Spread over the crust, top with fruit, and sprinkle with confectioner's sugar.
